chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 998 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on O/objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No. 4160/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.07.2025 Mr. Akhtar Hussain Legahri, Advocate for petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Daman Ali Leghari, Advocate for respondent No.5 along with respondent No.5. Mr. Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G. a/w SIP Ghulam Asghar Ujjan, appearing on behalf of SSP Khairpur and SIP/IO Iran Khan of PS Mir Wah. Mr. Syed Sardar Ali Rizvi, Addl. P.G. for state..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to the Process, the SIP/IO Iran Khan files statement, while SIP Asghar Ali files statement of SSP Khairpur, which are taken on record. The I/O present has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 today in earlier part of the day, which is taken on record. The petitioner No.1 in her statement stated that she was married with Imamuddin s/o Mehar Ali Dasti, but due to certain petty matters, she was ousted by her husband from his house by giving her verbal divorce. Later on, she started living with her father; however, after one year of divorce, she had contracted second marriage with Bashir Ali s/o Shah Muhamad Dasti (petitioner No.2) where she is passing her life happily. She however, stated that she apprehends danger to her life as well as life of her husband Bashir Ali (petitioner No.2) at the hands of her brother Muhammad Yaseen. Hence, Muhammad Yaseen, respondent No.5 lodged FIR, which is liable to be quashed. I.O. Iran Khan of PS Mirwah submits that he has submitted interim challan and further submitted that he will submit final challan before the Court in the light of statement petitioner No.1.

I.O. Iran Khan of PS Mirwah submits that he has submitted interim challan and further submitted that he will submit final challan before the Court in the light of statement petitioner No.1. Mr. Daman Ali Leghari, files his vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No. 5 along with statement along with annexures, which are C. P. No. D – 998 of 2025 Page 2 of 2 taken on record. He submits that ex-husband of the petitioner No.1 Imamuddin had not divorced her sister. While officials present submitted that they will provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. As far as the impugned FIR is concerned, I.O has submitted that he has submitted interim challan; however, in view of the averments made by petitioner No.1, through her statement, recorded by him today, he will submit final report in accordance with law. As far as claim of the respondent No.5, who has firstly argued that Imamuddin has not divorced to his sister, is concerned, he has an opportunity to file proper application before the Court of competent jurisdiction. In view of above the petition is disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. However, the SHO Police Station ‘A’ Section Mirwah and Senior Superintendent of Police (SSP) Khairpur are directed to provide legal protections to both the petitioners, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Shafqat dayo
